nexocore.math.name: nexocore.math
nexocore.math.author: Luca Cisternino
nexocore.math.description: Mathematical operations library. pow(), abs(), max(), min() — fully typed-free, native MSIL binding.
nexocore.math.code:
<3 Nexo Core - Mathematical Operations Library
<3 Copyright 2026 Florentina Spicco D'aura

<3 Calculates the exponential power of a base
do pow(base, exponent) {
    result = 1
    while exponent > 0 {
        result = result * base
        exponent = exponent - 1
    }
    return result
}

<3 Returns the absolute absolute value
do abs(val) {
    if val < 0 {
        return val * (0 - 1)
    }
    return val
}

<3 Evaluates the higher constraint
do max(a, b) {
    if a > b {
        return a
    }
    return b
}

<3 Evaluates the lower boundary
do min(a, b) {
    if a < b {
        return a
    }
    return b
}

nexocore.io.name: nexocore.io
nexocore.io.author: Luca Cisternino
nexocore.io.description: Input/Output protocol array. error(), success(), warn(), banner() — structured terminal output primitives.
nexocore.io.code:
<3 Nexo Core - Input/Output Protocol Array
<3 Copyright 2026 Florentina Spicco D'aura

<3 Throws a distinctly formatted Error payload
do error(message) {
    write "[V-ERROR] " + message
}

<3 Resolves a deeply formatted Success prompt
do success(message) {
    write "[V-SUCCESS] " + message
}

<3 Highlights an edge constraint payload
do warn(message) {
    write "[V-WARNING] " + message
}

<3 Generates a strict application bounding box banner
do banner(appName, version) {
    write "========================================="
    write "  " + appName + " (v" + version + ")"
    write "========================================="
}

nexocore.net.name: nexocore.net
nexocore.net.author: Luca Cisternino
nexocore.net.description: HTTP Networking protocols. get(), postJson() — native HTTP/S over .NET HttpClient with zero overhead.
nexocore.net.code:
<3 Nexo Core - HTTP Networking Protocols
<3 Copyright 2026 Florentina Spicco D'aura

<3 Dispatches a highly synchronous HTTP GET stream
do get(url) {
    return httpGet(url)
}

<3 Posts a JSON payload body forcefully to a target REST endpoint
do postJson(url, jsonString) {
    return httpPost(url, jsonString)
}

nexocore.json.name: nexocore.json
nexocore.json.author: Luca Cisternino
nexocore.json.description: JSON parsing and serialization. parse(), stringify() — bridges N# Maps and Lists to raw JSON natively.
nexocore.json.code:
<3 Nexo Core - JSON Ecosystem
<3 Copyright 2026 Florentina Spicco D'aura

<3 Synchronously parses a pure raw JSON string into deeply nested Map and Array objects
do parse(jsonString) {
    return jsonParse(jsonString)
}

<3 Stringifies a multidimensional N# Map or List back into a raw JSON textual footprint
do stringify(dataObject) {
    return jsonStringify(dataObject)
}

nexocore.fs.name: nexocore.fs
nexocore.fs.author: Luca Cisternino
nexocore.fs.description: File System manipulation. read(), write(), exists() — direct OS file I/O with native path resolution.
nexocore.fs.code:
<3 Nexo Core - File System Manipulation
<3 Copyright 2026 Florentina Spicco D'aura

<3 Reads absolute textual buffer from a file
do read(path) {
    return fileRead(path)
}

<3 Writes literal content string to a target bounding file
do write(path, content) {
    fileWrite(path, content)
}

<3 Evaluates the structural existence of an OS file path
do exists(path) {
    return fileExists(path)
}

nexocore.string.name: nexocore.string
nexocore.string.author: Luca Cisternino
nexocore.string.description: String manipulation primitives. length(), replace(), contains(), upper(), lower() — typed-free string operations.
nexocore.string.code:
<3 Nexo Core - String Manipulation
<3 Copyright 2026 Florentina Spicco D'aura

<3 Calculates literal length of a scalar string payload
do length(str) {
    return stringLength(str)
}

<3 Injects new payload across all matched instances
do replace(str, oldVal, newVal) {
    return stringReplace(str, oldVal, newVal)
}

<3 Ascertains if payload structure exists
do contains(str, val) {
    return stringContains(str, val)
}

do upper(str) {
    return stringUpper(str)
}

do lower(str) {
    return stringLower(str)
}

nexocore.map.name: nexocore.map
nexocore.map.author: Luca Cisternino
nexocore.map.description: Dynamic Memory Mapping (Dictionaries). create(), set(), get() — .NET Dictionary binding via native IL.
nexocore.map.code:
<3 Nexo Core - Dynamic Memory Mapping (Dictionaries)
<3 Copyright 2026 Florentina Spicco D'aura

<3 Instantiates a volatile Map (Dictionary Object) natively mapping to .NET IL Space
do create() {
    return mapCreate()
}

<3 Forcefully assigns a Value to a Key internally in the Map structure
do set(mapTarget, keyName, valueScalar) {
    mapSet(mapTarget, keyName, valueScalar)
}

<3 Safely extracts payload via a specific structural Key
do get(mapTarget, keyName) {
    return mapGet(mapTarget, keyName)
}

nexocore.time.name: nexocore.time
nexocore.time.author: Luca Cisternino
nexocore.time.description: Chronological ecosystem. sleep(), now() — OS thread halting and Unix millisecond timestamp from host hardware.
nexocore.time.code:
<3 Nexo Core - Chronological Ecosystem
<3 Copyright 2026 Florentina Spicco D'aura

<3 Halts native OS execution thread forcibly for milliseconds
do sleep(ms) {
    sleep(ms)
}

<3 Generates native Server Unix Milliseconds from Host Hardware
do now() {
    return systemTime()
}

nexocore.url.name: nexocore.url
nexocore.url.author: Luca Cisternino
nexocore.url.description: URL encoding/decoding protocol. encode(), decode() — RFC-compliant URI manipulation for HTTP pipelines.
nexocore.url.code:
<3 Nexo Core - URL Professional Protocol
<3 Copyright 2026 Florentina Spicco D'aura

<3 Encodes raw URI strings to be safely injected into HTTP requests natively
do encode(rawUrlStr) {
    return urlEncode(rawUrlStr)
}

<3 Decodes web URI encoded parameters into standard UTF-8 raw text
do decode(encodedStr) {
    return urlDecode(encodedStr)
}

nexocore.crypto.name: nexocore.crypto
nexocore.crypto.author: Luca Cisternino
nexocore.crypto.description: Cryptographic operations. base64Encode(), base64Decode() — native Base64 encoding via .NET Security APIs.
nexocore.crypto.code:
<3 Nexo Core - Cryptographic Operations
<3 Copyright 2026 Florentina Spicco D'aura

<3 Encodes raw UTF-8 String explicitly into Base64 format
do base64Encode(plainText) {
    return base64Encode(plainText)
}

<3 Decodes bound Base64 string payload back into literal UTF-8 string
do base64Decode(base64String) {
    return base64Decode(base64String)
}

nexocore.system.name: nexocore.system
nexocore.system.author: Luca Cisternino
nexocore.system.description: OS Terminal bindings. run() — directly executes raw Terminal/PowerShell/Bash commands via the host system.
nexocore.system.code:
<3 Nexo Core - OS Terminal Bindings
<3 Copyright 2026 Florentina Spicco D'aura

<3 Directly executes raw Terminal/PowerShell/Bash commands via the Host System
do run(terminalCommand) {
    return executeCommand(terminalCommand)
}

nexocore.discord.name: nexocore.discord
nexocore.discord.author: Luca Cisternino
nexocore.discord.description: Discord Webhook integration. sendWebhook() — broadcasts structured messages to Discord channels via native HTTP.
nexocore.discord.code:
<3 Nexo Core - Discord Webhook Integration
<3 Copyright 2026 Florentina Spicco D'aura

using nexocore.net

<3 Broadcasts an anonymous Webhook packet straight to a Discord channel
do sendWebhook(webhookUrl, botName, textMessage) {
    <3 Structuring raw JSON natively using N# string allocations
    rawJson = "{\"username\": \"" + botName + "\", \"content\": \"" + textMessage + "\"}"
    
    <3 Pipe the transmission through the .NET Native bounds
    response = postJson(webhookUrl, rawJson)
    return response
}

nexocore.ai.name: nexocore.ai
nexocore.ai.author: Luca Cisternino
nexocore.ai.description: AI Engine (Singularity). generateText(), prompt() — synchronous Cloud LLM calls with native N# unwrapping.
nexocore.ai.code:
<3 Nexo Core - Artificial Intelligence Engine (Singularity)
<3 Copyright 2026 Florentina Spicco D'aura

<3 Synchronously triggers Cloud LLM Hardware explicitly inside N# bounds.
<3 Automatically unwraps JSON responses, returning pure intelligence string streams.
do generateText(systemDirective, userQuery, openaiKeyToken) {
    return aiGenerate(systemDirective, userQuery, openaiKeyToken)
}

<3 Specialized routine utilizing a default behavior constraint for quick prompt completion
do prompt(query, openaiKeyToken) {
    return aiGenerate("You are a helpful, enterprise-level intelligence assistant executing inside the Nexo N# OS natively.", query, openaiKeyToken)
}

nexocore.cozmo.name: nexocore.cozmo
nexocore.cozmo.author: Luca Cisternino
nexocore.cozmo.description: Anki Cozmo robotics bridge. connect(), say(), move(), animate() — native MSIL command streams, bypasses Python SDK entirely.
nexocore.cozmo.code:
<3 Nexo Core - Cozmo Robotics Bridge
<3 Copyright 2026 Luca Cisternino

<3 Native N# library to control the Anki Cozmo robot.
<3 Bypasses Python SDKs to direct native MSIL command streams.

do connect(ip) {
    return CozmoConnect(ip)
}

do say(text) {
    CozmoSay(text)
}

do move(speed, distance) {
    CozmoMove(speed, distance)
}

do animate(animName) {
    CozmoAnimate(animName)
}

do setHead(angle) {
    CozmoSetHeadAngle(angle)
}
